zh.lifeSummary: 當Dorothy Pomeroy於1545年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋時，她的父親Sir Pomeroy25歲，母親Lady Pomeroy21歲。她於1562年與Alexander Alcock在英國英格蘭奧可福爾班波瑞結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1600年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾班波瑞享年55歲。

nameMeanings.name: Pomeroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin; mainly Devon and Dorset): habitational name from any of various places in northeastern France named with Old French pommeroie, pommeraie ‘apple orchard’ (collective of pomme ‘apple’). The name was established in Ireland in 1573.

nameMeanings.name: Dorothy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothee
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

variants.name: Dorothie
meanings: Usual English form of   Dorothea .  The name was not used in the Middle Ages, but was taken up in the 15th century and became common thereafter. It was borne by the American film star  Dorothy Lamour  (  1914–1996 , born  Dorothy Kaumeyer ).

en.lifeSummary: When Dorothy Pomeroy was born in 1545, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Pomeroy, was 25 and her mother, Lady Pomeroy, was 21. She married Alexander Alcock in 1562, in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1600, in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 55.

fr.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear distr: Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dorothy Pomeroy est née en 1545, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Pomeroy, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Lady Pomeroy, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Alexander Alcock en 1562, à Banbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1600, à Banbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear distr: Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Dorothy Pomeroy 1545 in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Pomeroy 25 und ihre Mutter Lady Pomeroy 21. Sie hat 1562 in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Alexander Alcock geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1600 im Alter von 55 Jahren in Banbury, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

Lei sposato Alexander Alcock nel 1562, nel Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1600, nel Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Dorothy Pomeroyが1545年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで生まれた時，父Sir Pomeroyは25歳，母Lady Pomeroyは21歳であった。1562年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアバンブリーでAlexander Alcockと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1600年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアバンブリーで55歳で死去した。

ko.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear distr: 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니
ko.lifeSummary: Dorothy Pomeroy(이)가 1545년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Pomeroy(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Pomeroy(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1562년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 반버이에서 Alexander Alcock(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1600년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 반버이에서 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dorothy Pomeroy nasceu em 1545, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Pomeroy, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Lady Pomeroy, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Alexander Alcock em 1562, em Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1600, em Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 55 anos.

ru.Newcastle upon Tyne, Tyne and Wear distr: нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dorothy Pomeroy родилась в 1545 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Pomeroy было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Pomeroy, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Alcock в 1562 г. в местности банбури, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1600 г. в местности банбури, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 55 лет.

Se casó con Alexander Alcock en 1562, en Banbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas.
